name: Chinese Egg Drop Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the chicken stock into a saucepan and bring it to a boil over medium-high heat.
2. Slowly dribble the beaten eggs into the boiling stock while stirring constantly. Use a spoon or whisk for best results.
3. Add the sliced spinach to the soup and continue cooking until heated through.
4. Serve hot.
